threats.title: ⚡ Weekly Recap: Axios Hack, Chrome 0-Day, Fortinet Exploits, Paragon Spyware and More
threats.summary: This week had real hits. The key software got tampered with. Active bugs showed up in the tools people use every day. Some attacks didn’t even need much effort because the path was already there. One weak spot now spreads wider than before. What starts small can reach a lot of systems fast. threats.title: How LiteLLM Turned Developer Machines Into Credential Vaults for Attackers
threats.summary: The most active piece of enterprise infrastructure in the company is the developer workstation. threats.title: BKA Identifies REvil Leaders Behind 130 German Ransomware Attacks
